name: Dream Eval — Weekly Quality Gate
description: Runs the dream evaluation pipeline: deterministic tests, golden corpus eval, faithfulness scoring, and metrics tracking.

prompts.content:
Apply the dream-eval-loop skill to run one evaluation pass of the dreaming plugin.

Steps:
1. cd to ~/.cursor/plugins/local/dreaming
2. Run `node cli/dream.mjs test --json` — if hard_fail is true, STOP and report the failure prominently.
3. In an isolated eval workspace, run dream-evaluator (readonly) over eval/golden-corpus with the pinned eval/soul-snapshot.md.
4. Run dream-judge (readonly, must NOT read soul.md) — score faithfulness + precision/recall against eval/golden-corpus/labels.json.
5. Run `node cli/dream.mjs decisions --json` for acceptance/regret rates.
6. Write eval/results/<run_id>/metrics.json (canonical metric names) and eval/results/<run_id>/summary.md.

Do NOT apply any memory or mutate ~/.cursor/AGENTS.md. Evaluation only.

Post the summary to chat. Flag hard failures (secret-leak, hash-determinism) prominently at the top.
